extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked when VALVERDE punctured, held off chase by MAS and URÁN to take massive GC time before PINOT soloed to stage win
tactical_patterns: YATES Simon exploited VALVERDE puncture timing to bridge, preventing Movistar team coverage on final climb.
BENNETT George immediately marked QUINTANA bridge attempt, showing Jumbo's tactical awareness before teammate commitment.
PINOT screened behind QUINTANA-KUSS group before attacking for stage, using GC riders as camouflage.
MAS Enric and URÁN counter-attacked together when VALVERDE dropped, coordinating despite different teams to chase YATES.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: attacked when rival punctured, then held GC gains against multiple chasers showing mental hardness beyond Covadonga
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: punctured after team set sustained pace, couldn't respond when rivals immediately attacked his misfortune
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: second stage win after hiding in break, only attacked once GC battle cleared ahead
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: appeared spent or deliberately waited for VALVERDE, unclear if tactical sacrifice or weakness
rider_signals.BENNETT George: positive: immediately followed QUINTANA bridge showing Jumbo's active GC defense for teammate
